ModMetaData.name: Emergency Transfusions
ModMetaData.author: Pausbrak
ModMetaData.description:
Perform emergency blood transfusions!
Similar to the drafted "tend now" command, you can now command your doctors to perform an emergency blood transfusion. Emergency transfusions use 1 hemogen pack, take the same time and restore the same amount of blood as a normal transfusion (35% blood loss). However, doctors can do it in the field and can use hemogen packs in their inventory, which can save precious seconds when your best pawns are bleeding out.
Additionally, this mod adds an option to have pawns carry hemogen packs in their inventories, found in the assign screen next to medicine.
